RESTAURANT.description: Dine-in restaurants, food trucks, food stalls, or eateries serving main meals at a physical location.
rules: Must offer prepared meals or dining experiences at a physical location (dine-in, food truck, or food market stall).
Includes traditional Filipino restaurants, diners, buffet spaces, specialized food trucks, and food market stalls.
DOES NOT include catering businesses with no physical dining premises.

CAFE.description: Coffee shops, bakeries (panaderya), bubble tea shops, dessert parlors, cake shops with a physical storefront.
rules: Primarily serves coffee, tea, pastries, bakery goods, or light desserts at a physical customer venue.
Includes panaderias and cake shops with physical storefronts.
DOES NOT include home bakers or online-only cake makers with no physical retail space.

SHOP.description: Retail stores, grocery shops, Asian/Filipino supermarkets, convenience stores, online shops, or sari-sari stores selling imported ingredients or merchandise.
rules: Sells physical packaged ingredients, imported groceries, clothing, or merchandise directly to consumers.
Can operate as a physical retail space, an online-only (virtual) storefront, or both.

CHURCH.description: Christian and Catholic churches, Tagalog mass fellowships, religious groups.
rules: A house of worship or organized religious community group holding regular services.
Provides chaplaincy or mass services tailored to the Filipino community.

GOVERNMENT.description: Official Philippine government listings, consulates, embassies, and honorary consular services.
rules: Must be an official department, embassy, consulate, or designated consular service of the Republic of the Philippines.

COMMUNITY.description: Organized clubs, community associations, non-profits, student clubs, and structured support groups.
rules: An organized group of individuals collaborating for community welfare, cultural preservation, support, or advocacy.
Must be a non-profit association, club, or community organization.
DOES NOT include local commercial business services (like tax services, travel agencies, cargo forwarders, etc.).

SERVICES.description: Professional and local business services (including home baking, catering, and event planning) that are not retail shops, dine-in food venues, government offices, or churches.
rules: A commercial entity offering professional, trade, personal, or event services to the community.
Includes tax accountants, migration agents, mechanics, logistics/freight providers (balikbayan boxes), hair salons, travel agencies, event planners, caterers, and home bakers.
DOES NOT include physical dine-in restaurants, cafes, or retail grocery stores.
